data.biography:
神谷浩史（日语：神谷 浩史／かみや ひろし Kamiya Hiroshi；1975年1月28日—），日本男性声优兼歌手，所属经纪公司为青二制作，唱片公司为Kiramune。 身高167公分，星座为水瓶座，血型为A型。

爱称“Hiro C”。为神谷浩史、小野大辅的DearGirl～Stories～广播中的昵称募集活动时，听众配合小野大辅的爱称“Ono D（小野D）”所取的。

出生于千叶县松户市，老家位于茨城县牛久市。

幼稚园时期写下的未来的梦想，是要当一名公车司机。小学时被家人带去朋友的道场学习空手道，当时参加的动力是单纯想着“能在假日去体育馆玩”，持续练到高中，并取得黑带资格，高中时在老师的劝诱下成立空手道部，担任副部长。

高中三年级时从空手道社团引退后，在朋友的拜托之下到朋友创立的戏剧社帮忙，却意外在比赛中担任男主角并一举拿下个人演技奖，从此志愿成为一名演员，报考大阪艺术大学舞台艺术科却不幸落榜。

落榜后在演剧杂志上看到青二塾的广告，在不知道青二塾其实是声优培训学校的情形下，成为了青二塾声优培训学校东京校区第十四期生，于1994年出道。
data.name: 神谷浩史

data.biography: Hiroshi Kamiya is a Japanese voice actor, singer and narrator affiliated with Aoni Production. He is best known for being the voice of Choromatsu Matsuno from Osomatsu-san, Takashi Natsume from Natsume Yūjin Chō, Seijuro Akashi from Kuroko's Basketball, Levi Ackerman from Attack on Titan, Mephisto Pheles from Blue Exorcist, Yuzuru Otonashi from Angel Beats!, Yato from Noragami, Nozomu Itoshiki from Sayonara, Zetsubou-Sensei, Koyomi Araragi from the Monogatari series, Sōma from Working!!, Izaya Orihara from Durarara!!, Trafalgar Law from One Piece, Tieria Erde from Mobile Suit Gundam 00, and Kinshirō Kusatsu from Cute High Earth Defense Club LOVE!. He won "Best Lead Actor" and "Best Personality" at the Third Seiyu Awards, and "Best Supporting Actor" at the Second Seiyu Awards. He hosts radio show Dear Girl Stories along with voice actor Daisuke Ono.
data.name: Hiroshi Kamiya

data.biography: 神谷浩史是日本的男性聲優、歌手、旁白。出身於千葉縣松戶市，畢業於青二塾東京校，所屬經紀公司為青二製作，唱片公司為 Kiramune。
data.name: 神谷浩史
คามิยะ ฮิโรชิ

data.biography:
Hiroshi Kamiya (神谷 浩史, Kamiya Hiroshi, nacido el 28 de enero de 1975) es un actor de doblaje, cantante y narrador japonés nacido en la ciudad de Matsudo, prefectura de Chiba y criado en la ciudad de Ushiku, prefectura de Ibaraki. Pertenece a Aoni Production.

Ganó el premio al mejor actor protagonista y a la mejor personalidad en los terceros Seiyu Awards, y al mejor actor de reparto en los segundos Seiyu Awards. Presenta el programa de radio Dear Girl Stories junto con el también actor de voz Daisuke Ono.
data.name: Hiroshi Kamiya

data.biography: Hiroshi Kamiya è un doppiatore, cantante e narratore giapponese affiliato alla Aoni Production. È noto soprattutto per essere la voce di Choromatsu Matsuno di Osomatsu-san, Takashi Natsume di Natsume Yūjin Chō, Seijuro Akashi di Kuroko no Basketball, Levi Ackerman di L’attacco dei Giganti, Mephisto Pheles di Blue Exorcist, Yuzuru Otonashi di Angel Beats! Yato di Noragami, Nozomu Itoshiki di Sayonara, Zetsubou-Sensei, Koyomi Araragi della serie Monogatari, Sōma di Working!!, Izaya Orihara di Durarara!!, Trafalgar Law di One Piece, Tieria Erde di Mobile Suit Gundam 00 e Kinshirō Kusatsu di Cute High Earth Defense Club LOVE!!!. Ha vinto i premi "Miglior attore protagonista" e "Miglior personaggio" ai Third Seiyu Awards e "Miglior attore non protagonista" ai Second Seiyu Awards. Conduce il programma radiofonico Dear Girl Stories insieme al doppiatore Daisuke Ono.
data.name: Hiroshi Kamiya

data.biography: 神谷浩史，日本男性聲優兼歌手，所屬經紀公司為青二製作，唱片公司為 Kiramune。
data.name: 神谷浩史
